overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain valley at golden hour. The snow-capped peak dominates the background while birds soar through the dramatic cloud-filled sky, creating a contemplative atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain cliff overlook with panoramic vista

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from right to left above the mountain peak
single bird flies close overhead from left to right across the frame

agents.ego_description: hooded character stands motionless on cliff edge, gazing at the distant mountain peak with slight idle animation

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying in formation across the sky

entered.detail: majestic snow-covered peak illuminated by golden sunlight breaking through clouds
rolling forested mountains extending to the horizon with layered atmospheric perspective
rocky mountain formations with steep cliffs descending to the valley
calm reflective water body nestled in the valley below catching the golden light
stone outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the steep drop to the forest below
dense green treetops covering the valley floor between the cliffs
weathered wooden fence post at the edge of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a breathtaking mountain vista at golden hour. A hooded figure stands on a rocky cliff edge, silhouetted against the dramatic sky. The camera holds steady behind the character, framing the snow-capped peak in the distance. Birds occasionally fly through the frame, adding life to the serene landscape. Warm sunlight breaks through scattered clouds, casting long rays across the valley and lake below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, contemplative gaze over a vast mountain vista as the golden hour light shifts across a serene landscape. It begins behind a hooded figure standing on a rocky cliff edge, silhouetted against a dramatic sky that frames a distant, snow-capped peak. As the camera holds its position, birds glide through the frame, adding a sense of movement to the stillness of the valley. The scene then expands visually as warm sunlight breaks through scattered clouds, casting long, shimmering rays across the deep valley and the lake below.
